name: E2E: every default standards source carries a fetch_frequency and is enrolled for regular re-scraping (refresh-driven enforcement)
command: GCS="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" ruby -ryaml -e 'n=0;ok=0;Dir[ENV["GCS"]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f|d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next;next unless d.is_a?(Hash)&&d["source"].is_a?(Hash);n+=1;ok+=1 if d["source"]["fetch_frequency"]};STDERR.puts(n>40&&ok==n ? "all-refreshable sources=#{n}" : "gap n=#{n} ok=#{ok}");exit(n>40&&ok==n ?0:1)' && [ -x "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" ] && echo e2e8-refresh-enrolled 1>&2
